experiment_title: 溴乙烷的水解及银镜反应实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="溴乙烷的水解及银镜反应实验" goal="观察溴乙烷水解生成卤化物离子的过程，并通过银镜反应检测卤化物离子" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="20ml" />
      <Component id="test_tube_2" type="test_tube" capacity="20ml" />
      <Component id="dropper_1" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="dropper_2" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="alcohol_lamp_1" type="alcohol_lamp" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Bromoethane" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="NaOH_5percent" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Dilute_HNO3" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="AgNO3_solution" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="C2H5Br" volume="0.5 mL" tool="dropper_1" id="step_0" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="NaOH" volume="1 mL" tool="dropper_1" id="step_1" />
      <Stir vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_2" />
      <Heat vessel="test_tube_1" target_temperature="60" id="step_3" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_4" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="test_tube_1" to_vessel="test_tube_2" volume="1 mL" tool="dropper_2" id="step_5" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="HNO3" volume="1 mL" tool="dropper_2" id="step_6" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="AgNO3" volume="0.1 mL" tool="dropper_2" id="step_7" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_8" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 在试管中加入溴乙烷和稀氢氧化钠溶液，并充分混合，为水解反应做准备。
加热混合液至60℃并保持一段时间，促使溴乙烷发生水解反应生成卤化物离子。
取部分反应液至另一试管，并加入稀硝酸酸化，为后续银镜反应做准备。
向酸化后的溶液中加入硝酸银溶液，静置观察是否有沉淀生成，以检测卤化物离子的存在。
